metadata.description: Marketplace for claude-docs-creator — the .claude/ documentation authoring + validation toolkit.

plugins.name: claude-docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs in any project, plus automated frontend analysis optimized for downstream component-creation agents. Ships 10 public skills (init-project, create-docs, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, analyze-frontend, create-mermaid, research, create-steps, create-tutorial), 9 agents (doc-reviewer, module-documenter, frontend-detector, tech-stack-profiler, design-system-scanner, component-inventory, data-flow-mapper, architecture-analyzer, framework-idiom-extractor), 10 scoped rules, 6 hooks, and a set of reference docs + tutorials. /analyze-frontend uses a two-wave flow (stack profile → stack-informed specialists) and produces a prescriptive component-creation-template.md — the primary context envelope for agents that create new components.
